description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/atomicrex/atomicrex/ci and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_linux job (tagged with linux) that runs mkdir build, cd build, cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DPYTHON_INCLUDE_DIR=/usr/include/python3.6m -DPYTHON_LIBRARY=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.6m.so -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../install .., make -j4, ctest --output-on-failure, and make userguide, then archives the path doc/userguide/build as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on build_linux, moves doc/userguide/build and doc/google*.html into a public/ directory, runs chmod go-rwX -R public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
